name: S-12 merge overrides bundled catalog values when the operator file declares the same id (operator wins per §2.6)
command:
printf -- '- id: shared
  url: https://bundled.com
  tier: 1
' > catalog.yaml && printf -- '- id: shared
  url: https://operator.com
' > operator.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/merge-registry.sh" --catalog catalog.yaml --operator operator.yaml --emit merged.yaml && grep -q 'url: https://operator.com' merged.yaml && ! grep -q 'url: https://bundled.com' merged.yaml && echo overridden 1>&2
